description_long: This is a large, modular shelving and storage unit constructed primarily from dark wood, featuring a symmetrical design with three main vertical sections. Each section is supported by vertical metal rods that extend above and below the shelving, ending in round metal caps at the top and adjustable feet at the bottom. The unit includes a combination of open shelves and closed compartments, with the closed sections featuring flat, rectangular doors or drawers in both wood and white finishes. The open shelves are evenly spaced and provide ample surface area for displaying or storing items, while the closed compartments offer concealed storage. The overall structure is elevated off the ground by metal legs, giving it a light, airy appearance despite its substantial size. The design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or upscale residential spaces.
description: A large, modern modular shelving unit with dark wood, metal supports, open shelves, and closed compartments in wood and white finishes.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full arrangement of open shelves and closed compartments, with both wood and white-faced doors visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the vertical metal supports, with the layered structure of the compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the unit, with all compartments and shelves in dark wood and no visible handles or white panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and stacked arrangement of the shelves and compartments.
